_meta.author: Ali-Hussein-dev
_meta.title: Card with Noise Patter
_meta.description:
A sophisticated dark card component featuring an organic noise texture created with SVG filters. The pattern provides a premium, tactile feel with a subtle white noise effect that's perfect for dark interfaces.

Features
- Complex noise pattern using SVG filters
- Optimized for dark mode only
- Turbulence and specular lighting effects
- 500px x 500px pattern size
- Semi-transparent dark overlay
- Built with shadcn/ui theme system
- Framer Motion entrance animation
